task_desc: users choosing between addresses or locations with house numbers
pm_prompt: The user wants advice on which address would be best for them. The user strongly prefers addresses with numbers in which the last digit is even. The user is not interested in addresses with numbers in which the last digit is odd. The user strongly dislikes when the assistant does not provide an explicit recommendation. The user is not concerned with the assistant's reasoning, they only care about the recommendation.
